scope: Full legacy-parity migration: the 4 legacy streams (orders, order_line_items, shipping_fulfillments, payment_disputes) matching internal/connectors/ebay-fulfillment's exact endpoint set; the full eBay Sell Fulfillment surface (single-order lookup, shipping-fulfillment sub-resource CRUD, issue-refund) is out of scope until Pass B

excluded.reason: /sell/fulfillment/v1/order/{orderId} is a detail or scoped sub-resource endpoint requiring caller-supplied identifiers or fan-out beyond this bundle's current spec; the implemented list streams cover the configured collection surface where applicable

/sell/fulfillment/v1/order/{orderId}/shipping_fulfillment is a detail or scoped sub-resource endpoint requiring caller-supplied identifiers or fan-out beyond this bundle's current spec; the implemented list streams cover the configured collection surface where applicable

/sell/fulfillment/v1/order/{orderId}/shipping_fulfillment/{fulfillmentId} is a detail or scoped sub-resource endpoint requiring caller-supplied identifiers or fan-out beyond this bundle's current spec; the implemented list streams cover the configured collection surface where applicable
/sell/fulfillment/v1/order/{orderId}/shipping_fulfillment is a mutation endpoint; this bundle has no reviewed write record schema, approval risk, or legacy write contract for that operation

/sell/fulfillment/v1/payment_dispute/{payment_dispute_id} is a detail or scoped sub-resource endpoint requiring caller-supplied identifiers or fan-out beyond this bundle's current spec; the implemented list streams cover the configured collection surface where applicable
/sell/fulfillment/v1/payment_dispute/{payment_dispute_id}/accept is a destructive/admin mutation and is not exposed as a reverse-ETL action in this bundle
/sell/fulfillment/v1/payment_dispute/{payment_dispute_id}/contest is a destructive/admin mutation and is not exposed as a reverse-ETL action in this bundle
